title: IREN December 2024 Monthly Update
text: IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) released its monthly update for December 2024, highlighting significant growth across bitcoin mining and AI infrastructure operations. The company mined 529 bitcoin in December, generating record revenue of $52.1 million, a 60% increase from November. Mining operations achieved a 77% hardware profit margin with $40.1 million in hardware profit. The average operating hashrate reached 28.1 EH/s, expanding to 31 EH/s installed capacity by month-end. IREN completed Childress Phase 3, bringing total operating capacity to 510MW across four global facilities. The company is on track to reach 50 EH/s in the first half of 2025, with Childress Phases 4 and 5 under construction to add 300MW. The company installed 1,896 NVIDIA H100 and H200 GPUs for AI Cloud Services, generating $0.8 million in revenue with a 98% hardware profit margin. IREN is actively negotiating additional AI monetization opportunities and installing liquid cooling systems to support NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs. The year saw a 450% increase in mining capacity from 5.6 EH/s to 31 EH/s and an accelerated Sweetwater site energization timeline, now targeted for April 2026 rather than October 2026.
